name: gb300_nvl72
_comment: GB300 NVL72: Blackwell Ultra, 288 GB HBM3E @ 8 TB/s per chip (12-Hi HBM3E stacks vs B200's 8-Hi — capacity rises, per-stack BW unchanged from B200), FP16 dense 3750 TFLOPS/GPU per published spec (FP8 = 7500, FP4 = 15000 by linear byte scaling). NVLink5 1.8 TB/s bidir (900 GB/s single-direction), NVLS-capable per NVSwitch5. All 72 GPUs in single NVLink domain via 9 NVSwitch Gen3 chips (64.8 TB/s single-dir system aggregate). hbm_eta_beta=0.7 matches GB200's measured efficiency on the same HBM3E technology.
